---
title: "Youth of Queen Elizabeth 1533-1558, The By Louis Wiesener"
---

## Youth of Queen Elizabeth 1533-1558, The By Louis Wiesener

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1879
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London : Hurst and Blackett.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
